title: ainsliaea glabra var. sutchuenensis
intro: Ainsliaea glabra var. sutchuenensis is a type of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family, native to China and used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia, making it a popular herbal remedy for overall health and well-being. Ainsliaea glabra var. sutchuenensis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to harness its health benefits.
